mapper.update:
update base_entrust_relationship set state = #{bean.state},
start_time = #{modifiedDate},
stop_time = #{modifiedDate},
modified_by = #{bean.userId}, modified_name = #{bean.userName}, modified_date = #{modifiedDate} where id = #{bean.id}
mapper.sql: id as id, entrust_range as entrustRange, entrust_type as entrustType, entrust_source as entrustSource, default_flag as defaultFlag, state as state, group_id as groupId, owner_id as ownerId, purchase_sale_org_id as purchaseSaleOrg, warehouse_provider_id as warehouseProvider, stock_org_id as stockOrg, warehouse_id as warehouse_id, logistics_provider_id as logisticsProvider, logistics_org_id as logisticsOrg, pay_receive_org_id as payReceiveOrg, settment_org_id as settmentOrg, account_org_id as accountOrg, business_org_id as businessOrg, ori_acc_code as oriAccCode, relevance_logistics_provider_id as relevanceLogisticsProvider, relevance_logistics_org_id as relevanceLogisticsOrg, created_by as createdBy, created_date as createdDate, modified_by as modifiedBy, modified_date as modifiedDate
mapper.select: SELECT id as relationId, warehouse_provider_id as storageProviderId, stock_org_id as stockOrgId, warehouse_id as warehouseId, default_flag as defaultFlag FROM base_entrust_relationship WHERE purchase_sale_org_id = #{orgId} and entrust_type = 1 and state = 1
SELECT id as id, business_org_id, settment_org_id, account_org_id, default_flag FROM base_entrust_relationship WHERE entrust_type = 6 and state = 1 and business_org_id = #{queryParam.bizOrgId}

SELECT DISTINCT org.id AS orgId, org.org_type AS orgType, org.org_code AS orgCode, org.org_name AS orgName, org.group_id AS groupId, rel.warehouse_provider_id AS warehouseProviderId FROM base_entrust_relationship rel LEFT JOIN base_organization org ON rel.purchase_sale_org_id = org.id WHERE rel.state = 1 AND rel.entrust_type = 1 AND rel.purchase_sale_org_id = #{purchaseSaleOrgId}
